prompt: Improve audit.html and log_line.html. Add a text search input to filter bar, add severity badges using .badge classes to log_line partial, make layout intentional with .page-header. Update app.css only if absolutely needed.

assertions.text: audit-has-page-header: audit.html output contains page-header class
filter-bar-has-text-search: audit.html has an input[type=text] with hx-trigger containing keyup in or near filter-bar
log-line-uses-badge-for-severity: log_line.html uses badge and badge-* class for severity, not plain text
htmx-uses-partial-pattern: HTMX get URLs use ?partial= query param or hx-vals with partial key
no-new-css-framework: Output files do not reference bootstrap, tailwind, or any CDN
no-inline-js-filter: Does not use vanilla JS DOM manipulation for filtering instead of HTMX
